title: ScenarioRequest
description: Payload sent to the cashflow engine for a scenario run. Contains user-provided parameters only. No outputs, no run_id — those are returned by the engine. Produced by scenario-design-agent and submitted by model-execution-agent.

scenario_id.description: Unique scenario identifier. Created before submission.

deal_id.description: Parent deal identifier. Must match a valid, validated deal.

name.description: Human label for the scenario, e.g. 'Baseline', 'Stressed recoveries — 10pt down'.

parameters.description: Engine input parameters. Must be non-empty before submission. Required keys: default_rate, recovery_rate, spread_shock_bps.

funding_cost_bps.description: Additional funding cost overlay in bps. Optional.

assumptions_made.description: List of assumptions scenario-design-agent applied when parameters were incomplete. Surfaced to the user before submission.

flagged_ambiguities.description: Ambiguous or incomplete user instructions that were resolved conservatively. Must be reviewed by the user.
